name: Heroin Hero
short_description: Chase the dragon in an absurd parody with no goal, no map, and no mercy. A satirical trip through addiction, trees, and your own brain. You might catch him. You might not.
detailed_description:
You chase the dragon. That’s it.

No quests. No map. No clue what you’re doing.
Just you, a magical forest, and one smug pink dragon that always stays juuust out of reach.

Heroin Hero is a satirical first-person fever dream, inspired by the legendary South Park episode and lovingly expanded into a full, chaotic experience filled with confusion, color, and questionable decisions.

What to expect:

  • A vibrant forest that gets weirder the deeper you go

  • A dragon that mocks you by merely existing

  • No hand-holding. No tutorials. No mercy.

  • Achievements you don’t need, but will totally chase anyway

  • Emotions, hallucinations, and a shack you call "home"

  • And maybe… just maybe… you’ll catch him.
